description: 20 reviews across 2 locations with mixed reply states: some have replies from before your sync, some don't. Confirms sync doesn't clobber existing replies and handles unanswered reviews separately.

profile.description: Iconic oceanfront resort on Miami Beach. 280 rooms, 3 restaurants, rooftop pool, world-class spa, and direct beach access.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev001
200000001.comment: Stunning oceanfront views, immaculate rooms, and the breakfast buffet is genuinely world-class. The spa was the highlight — booked in for 3 hours and left floating on air. Worth every penny.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much, Karen! We are thrilled the spa was a highlight — our therapists put their heart into every session. We can't wait to welcome you back to the shores of Miami Beach. 🌴

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev003
200000001.comment: Great hotel with excellent beach access and a wonderful pool area. Minor hiccup with room assignment on arrival but the front desk resolved it quickly and graciously. Would definitely return.

reviewReply.comment: Mia, we're glad our team turned things around quickly! That's exactly the responsiveness we strive for. See you on the beach soon! ☀️

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev005
200000001.comment: Honeymoon stay was absolutely magical. The team arranged turndown with rose petals and champagne without us asking — they clearly read the notes we left during booking. The level of care here is exceptional.

reviewReply.comment: Oliver, congratulations on your wedding! Creating magical memories for honeymooners is one of our greatest joys. Wishing you both a lifetime of happiness! 💍

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev007
200000001.comment: Hotel is beautiful but the air conditioning in room 418 made a loud banging noise all night. Maintenance came twice and couldn't fix it. Management moved us to another room at 2am which was handled well, but the first two nights were exhausting.

reviewReply.comment: Patricia, we sincerely apologize for the disruption. Room 418 has since been fully serviced and that unit replaced. We're grateful for your patience and would love to offer you a complimentary stay to make it right.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev009
200000001.comment: The rooftop bar is worth the visit alone even if you're not staying. Incredible sunset views over the ocean. Our room was immaculate and the bed was the most comfortable hotel bed I've ever slept in. Five stars, zero hesitation.

reviewReply.comment: Rachel, rooftop sunsets over Miami Beach never get old — we're so glad you experienced it! Sweet dreams on that pillow-top bed. Come back anytime! 🌅

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev002
200000001.comment: Room was noisy from street-level. I know it's South Beach but the walls are very thin. Paid for 'ocean view' but it was more 'parking lot view' with a sliver of ocean in the distance. Management was polite when I raised the issue but no resolution offered.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev004
200000001.comment: Great hotel overall. Beach service team is excellent — always proactive with towels and drinks. The main restaurant had slow service but the food was good once it arrived. Would come back for the beach access alone.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev006
200000001.comment: Booked a king suite for our anniversary. Arrived to find a double room. Was told there was a 'system error'. No suite available for the full 4-night stay. The compensation offered was breakfast — completely inadequate for the circumstances.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev008
200000001.comment: Check-in was seamless, bellhop was helpful with luggage, and the concierge had great restaurant recommendations. Room was a good size. Pool was occasionally crowded in the afternoon but that's to be expected in March.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev010
200000001.comment: Traveled solo and felt completely safe and well cared for. The team checked in proactively, recommended the best sunset spots, and arranged a boat tour for me on short notice. This place goes above and beyond.

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev001
200000002.comment: Intimate and charming. The Key West location is smaller but the attention to detail is extraordinary. Each room is individually decorated — ours had a maritime antique theme that was stunning. Breakfast on the porch was perfection.

reviewReply.comment: Tom, the maritime room is one of our absolute favourites! We think you chose well. Breakfast on the porch with the Key West breeze — magic. Come back anytime. 🌺

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev003
200000002.comment: Lovely boutique feel. Great cocktail bar with original Key West recipes. Room was cozy and comfortable. Only issue was the shower pressure was low — minor but worth mentioning for a premium property.

reviewReply.comment: Uma, thank you for the note on shower pressure — we've since replaced the fixtures in that wing. The cocktail bar is one of our prides! We'd love to have you try our new sunset rum punch.

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev002
200000002.comment: Hidden gem of Key West. The owner personally greeted us on arrival and gave us local recommendations that led to the best dinner of our trip. This is what travel should feel like — real connection, not just a transaction.

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev004
200000002.comment: Nice location but the room felt dated compared to the price point. The tropical garden is lovely but the room itself needs a refresh — outdated fixtures and an uncomfortable mattress. Staff were friendly and helpful.

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev005
200000002.comment: Perfect for couples. Quiet, romantic, great porch area with hammocks. Close to Duval Street but far enough to escape the noise. The homemade granola at breakfast was worth waking up for.
